data.name: CreateFirstWarehouse
data.value: Create your first warehouse to get started

data.name: FindProductsBy
data.value: Find products by SKU, name, or location

data.name: EnterSearchCriteria
data.value: Enter search criteria to find inventory

data.name: NoAsnFoundCreate
data.value: No ASN found. Click "New ASN" to create.

data.name: PickListsDescription
data.value: Lists of items to pick for orders

data.name: TrackItemsByLot
data.value: Track items by lot/batch and movements

data.name: MoveReceivedGoodsIntoStorage
data.value: Move received goods into storage locations

data.name: ConfirmDeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this purchase order?

data.name: EnterUnloadPersonName
data.value: Enter Unload Person Name for {0} items

data.name: PleaseEnterArrivalTimeFor
data.value: Please enter arrival time for {0} items

data.name: RejectASNMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to reject the selected ASNs?

data.name: PleaseSelectArrivalDateAndTime
data.value: Please select arrival date and time

data.name: PleaseSelectArrivalTimeForSelectedASNs
data.value: Please select arrival time for selected ASNs

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneASNToConfirm
data.value: Please select at least one ASN to confirm

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneItem
data.value: Please select at least one item

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneRow
data.value: Please select at least one row

data.name: NoQRCodeForSelectedItem
data.value: No QR code for selected item

data.name: NoQRCodesForSelectedItems
data.value: No QR codes for selected items

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneToSave
data.value: Please select at least one row to save

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneToSign
data.value: Please select at least one row to sign

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneToWeigh
data.value: Please select at least one row to weigh

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneToDeliver
data.value: Please select at least one row to deliver

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneToPack
data.value: Please select at least one row to pack

data.name: SortedQuantityMinimum
data.value: Sorted quantity must be at least 1

data.name: SourceAndDestCannotBeSame
data.value: Source and destination cannot be same

data.name: SystemErrorDeleteASN
data.value: System error occurred while deleting ASN

data.name: LoginErrorMissingInfo
data.value: Please provide all required login information

data.name: SelectRowToPrint
data.value: Please select a row to print

data.name: SelectRowToViewQR
data.value: Please select a row to view QR

data.name: TransferQtyMustBeGreaterThanZero
data.value: Transfer quantity must be greater than zero

data.name: SelectRowToExport
data.value: Please select at least one row to export.

data.name: ConfirmPutawayMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to putaway {0} items?

data.name: PleaseAddAtLeastOneItem
data.value: Please add at least one item.

data.name: DuplicateSkuWithSameExpiryDate
data.value: Duplicate SKU with the same Expiry Date

data.name: ConfirmCreatePO
data.value: Are you sure you want to create this Purchase Order?

data.name: POResetSuccess
data.value: PO has been reset. You can now select a new one.

data.name: OnlyOnePOAllowed
data.value: Only one Purchase Order can be imported per ASN. Please reset the current PO first.

data.name: TotalQtyMustMatchSortedQty
data.value: Total quantity must match sorted quantity

data.name: EachItemMustHaveValidQuantity
data.value: Each item must have a quantity of at least 1

data.name: AllItemsMustHaveLocation
data.value: All items must have a location assigned

data.name: DuplicateLocationNotAllowed
data.value: Each item must have a unique location. Duplicate locations are not allowed.

data.name: NoQrCodeFound
data.value: No QR codes found for this item

data.name: PopupBlockedMessage
data.value: Popup blocked. Please allow popups for this site.

data.name: ClosePOConfirmMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to close this Purchase Order? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: POHasPendingASN
data.value: Please complete or cancel pending ASNs before closing this PO

data.name: POAlreadyClosed
data.value: This Purchase Order is already completed or cancelled

data.name: HasExpiredLessThanDeliveryDate
data.value: The expiration date should always be greater than or equal to the delivery date

data.name: CreateReceipt_OrderDetailHint
data.value: Select actually delivered items to add to the receipt.

data.name: CreateReceipt_ValidAtLeastOneItem
data.value: Please add at least 1 item row!

data.name: CreateReceipt_ValidSelectWhFirst
data.value: Please select a warehouse before choosing a location!

data.name: CreateReceipt_PalletNoResponse
data.value: No pallet code received from server!

data.name: CreateReceipt_SearchItemPlaceholder
data.value: Search by item code, item name...

data.name: CreateReceipt_PalletLocationConflict
data.value: Pallet {0} is assigned to multiple locations ({1} and {2}). Please check again.

data.name: CreateOutboundReceipt_ItemSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Type item code or item name to search...

data.name: CreateOutboundReceipt_OrderSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by order code or customer name...

data.name: CreateOutboundReceipt_OrderDetailHint
data.value: Tick items to import into the current outbound receipt.

data.name: CreateOutboundReceipt_ValidCustomerCodeAndName
data.value: Please enter both customer code and customer name.

data.name: CreateOutboundReceipt_SelectItemBeforeLocation
data.value: Please select an item before selecting location.

data.name: CreateOutboundReceipt_NoLocationData
data.value: No location data returned from server.

data.name: CreateOutboundReceipt_SelectAtLeastOneItem
data.value: Please select at least one item.

data.name: AreYouSureYouWantToDeleteThisReceipt
data.value: Are You Sure You Want To Delete This Receipt

data.name: Confirm_DeleteReceiptMessage
data.value: Are you sure to delete this receipt

data.name: SloganWMS
data.value: Take control of your warehouse processes and eliminate operational errors!
